name: Flins
description:
Flins is a newly revealed five-star Electro character from the Nod-Krai region in the upcoming Genshin Impact 6.0 update. He is a member of the Lightkeepers faction, works in a lighthouse, and was awarded a commendation for his actions. Despite his past efforts to repel Abyssal creatures, Flins lost his squad during a mission, which led him to become a stoic figure known for his tactical skills and for guarding a local cemetery.

Art by @rente_gu in Danbooru
creator: AimanZQ
